title: Greek Yogurt Ranch Dip
description: A high-protein, lightened-up ranch dip using Greek yogurt instead of sour cream and mayo — great with carrots or other veggies.
ingredients: 1 tbsp fresh dill, chopped (or 1 tsp dried)
1/2 tsp white or apple cider vinegar
instructions: In a medium bowl, add 1 cup (240g) 0% plain Greek yogurt.
Stir in 2 tbsp low-fat buttermilk to thin it to a dip-like consistency.
Add 1 tsp garlic powder and 1 tsp onion powder.
Add 1/4 tsp salt and 1/8 tsp black pepper.
Stir in 1/2 tsp vinegar to brighten the flavor.
Whisk until fully smooth and combined.
Cover and refrigerate at least 20 minutes so the dill can bloom before serving with carrots.
notes: If it's too thick after chilling, thin with an extra splash of buttermilk or milk. Dill and onion powder carry most of the ranch flavor here — feel free to bump garlic powder to 1.5 tsp if you want it more pronounced.
